---
title: "Research"
---

## Research interests

My research interests include:

- [Area 1]
- [Area 2]
- [Area 3]
- [Area 4]

## Research overview

Write one or two paragraphs here explaining your mathematical interests in a way that is useful for other mathematicians but still readable for visitors from nearby areas.

For example:

> I am interested in problems at the interface of [field A] and [field B]. A recurring theme in my work is [theme], especially in connection with [objects / methods / conjectures].

## Current projects

### Project title 1

Brief description. Links to notes, preprints, code, or collaborators can go here.

### Project title 2

Brief description.
